prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SHM-SDCARDCOIN-PARENT-2 Product Type: SAFE Brand (from catalog): CCS Spy Gear Existing Title: Micro SD Card Covert Coin - Secret Compartment Diversion Safe Description: These Covert Coins are expertly hand-made from real coins to create a secret interior compartment within the coin. Once the coin is shut, they are impossible to tell apart from regular coins with the naked eye.

Because of their precision seal, they can be handled without the chance of accidentally being opened.

Each coin comes with an opening ring, without which can be nearly impossible to open the coin. Search Terms: spy coin micro sd secret compartment tactical microsd hidden hollow covert half dollar for chip Features: - Once closed, they are absolutely indistinguishable from regular coins to the naked eye - They can be handled normally without any chance of an accidental opening - An opening device is supplied with each covert coin, without which it's next to impossible to open up the coin. - Quarter ONLY - Will NOT Fit Micro SD card === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: CCS Spy Gear Micro SD Card Covert Coin Secret Safe

openai.item_name: CCS Spy Gear Quarter Covert Coin Secret Compartment Safe

anthropic.title_differentiation: Hidden Compartment, Indistinguishable From Real Coin, Includes Opening Ring, Secure Seal, Spy Gear Storage

openai.title_differentiation: Real Coin Construction, Hidden Secret Compartment, Precision Seal, Includes Opening Ring, Quarter Size
